name: GIGABYTE Z890 AORUS PRO ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9500(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 5x M.2 Slots - Dual Thunderbolt 4 Type-C with DP-Alt - Realtek 5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE Z890 AORUS PRO ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Full-size ATX LGA 1851 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-9500, dual Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 7 for Intel 890.
